skill_execution.question: Who set the fastest lap in qualifying?

sql:
SELECT
    d.full_name,
    d.driver_code,
    l.lap_time_formatted,
    s.event_name
FROM
    f1_data_library_DS.laps AS l
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.sessions AS s
ON
    l.session_key = s.session_key
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_driver_number_mapping AS d
ON
    l.driver_number = d.driver_number AND l.season = d.season
WHERE
    s.session_type = 'Qualifying'
    AND l.season = 2026
ORDER BY
    l.lap_duration ASC
LIMIT 1
